name: explorer-view
description: Standalone file explorer view module. Dev HTTPS: PEM files in certs/ (see npm run ssl:localhost); else plugin-basic-ssl. Port 443 may need privileges; npm run dev:8443 otherwise.

scripts.ssl:localhost: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 825 -subj '/CN=localhost'
